# Skagit County ArcGIS Custom GPT Technical Document

Generated from `https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services` on `2026-05-01T13:40:40Z`.

## Purpose

This document is the knowledge file for a phone-friendly internal Custom GPT that queries Skagit County ArcGIS REST services directly. It is paired with `skagit_arcgis_master_openapi.yaml`, which exposes generic read-only ArcGIS metadata, find, and query operations. The GPT should use this document to choose the correct folder, service, layer id, fields, and query pattern before calling the action.

## Inventory Summary

- REST root: https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services
- ArcGIS Server version: 10.81
- Services crawled: 134
- Layers and tables crawled: 1083
- Service types: FeatureServer: 13, MapServer: 1070
- Layers/tables by folder: Geocortex: 311, Basemaps: 157, Planning: 96, SCData: 87, Districts: 86, PublicWorks: 81, EPL: 59, Incidents: 55, Assessor: 46, Health: 34, TransportationUtilities: 32, Images: 13, Sheriff: 9, ParksFacilities: 6, CommunityBasemaps: 4, OpenData: 4, StoryMaps: 3

## Full Service Endpoint Catalog

These are all service endpoints discovered from the REST directory. MapServer and FeatureServer services may expose queryable layers/tables; ImageServer, GPServer, and GeometryServer services expose service-specific operations and should be inspected with `getServiceMetadata` before use.

- Service endpoint types: FeatureServer: 8, GPServer: 9, GeometryServer: 1, ImageServer: 28, MapServer: 88

### Services in Assessor

- **ActiveBuildingPermits (MapServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/ActiveBuildingPermits/MapServer
  Description: Active building permit data from the Assessor database.
  Layers/tables: 12; supported query formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **PropertyInfoWebMap (MapServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/PropertyInfoWebMap/MapServer
  Description: Shows current property information, optimized for mobile devices, for Skagit County, Washington.
  Layers/tables: 7; supported query formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **PropertyMap (MapServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/PropertyMap/MapServer
  Description: This map service contains data from Skagit County for viewing Assessor Tax Parcel information.
  Layers/tables: 7; supported query formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **PropertyMapMobile (MapServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/PropertyMapMobile/MapServer
  Description: This map service contains data from Skagit County for viewing Assessor Tax Parcel information.
  Layers/tables: 4; supported query formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **PropertyMap_CU_Inside (MapServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/PropertyMap_CU_Inside/MapServer
  Description: Current use layer tracks properties that are enrolled in the State Current Use and Designated Forest lands tax deferral program. This program is managed by the Skagit County Assessors office and records the official documents placing the property into the program and the agreement with the landowner to meet the requirements of keeping the property in the designation. In some cases a portion of a property is entered into the agreement and this GIS layer specifies the portions of the property in each type of designation.
  Layers/tables: 8; supported query formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **PropertySalesData (MapServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/PropertySalesData/MapServer
  Description: Property sales information from the Assessor database
  Layers/tables: 8; supported query formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.

  Layers/tables: 3; supported query formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.

### Services in Geoprocessing

- **AdvancedHQPrinting2020 (GPServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geoprocessing/AdvancedHQPrinting2020/GPServer
  Description: This print service is used when printing to scale.
- **AdvancedSecureHQPrinting (GPServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geoprocessing/AdvancedSecureHQPrinting/GPServer
  Description: Advanced High-Quality printing with secured services
- **BasicPrinting (GPServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geoprocessing/BasicPrinting/GPServer
  Description: This tool takes the state of a web application (for example, included services, layer visibility settings, and client-side graphics) and returns a printable page layout or basic map of the specified area of interest., The input for Export Web Map is a piece of text in JavaScript object notation (JSON) format describing the layers, graphics, and other settings in the web map. The JSON must be structured according to the ExportWebMap specification in the ArcGIS Help., This tool is shipped with ArcGIS Server to support web services for printing, including the preconfigured service named PrintingTools. The ArcGIS web APIs for JavaScript, Flex and Silverlight use the PrintingTools service to generate images for simple map printing.
- **SecureHQPrinting (GPServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geoprocessing/SecureHQPrinting/GPServer
  Description: Secure high-quality printing
- **SecuredPrinting (GPServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geoprocessing/SecuredPrinting/GPServer
  Description: This tool takes the state of a web application (for example, included services, layer visibility settings, and client-side graphics) and returns a printable page layout or basic map of the specified area of interest., The input for Export Web Map is a piece of text in JavaScript object notation (JSON) format describing the layers, graphics, and other settings in the web map. The JSON must be structured according to the ExportWebMap specification in the ArcGIS Help., This tool is shipped with ArcGIS Server to support web services for printing, including the preconfigured service named PrintingTools. The ArcGIS web APIs for JavaScript, Flex and Silverlight use the PrintingTools service to generate images for simple map printing.

### Services in Incidents

- **SkagitCountyEmergencyMap (MapServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Incidents/SkagitCountyEmergencyMap/MapServer
  Description: This map is intended to show live information related to an occurring Skagit County emergency. The data on this map is intended to be used with the Esri Topographic Basemap or the Esri Imagery Basemap.
  Layers/tables: 55; supported query formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.

### Services in OpenData

- **AssessorDataParcels (FeatureServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataParcels/FeatureServer
  Description: <DIV STYLE="text-align:Left;"><DIV><DIV><DIV STYLE="font-size:12pt"><P><SPAN>The Tax Parcels Layer “Property Category” represents Assessor Tax Parcels. They were created for the County Assessor to represent tax segregations. They do not represent "buildable lots". For example, if a parcel is placed in the "open space taxation program", it may be segmented into two pieces. One piece is taxed for "open space" while the other is reserved for "residential" use. This shows up as a parcel with a boundary line separating the different tax designations. This information is updated on a weekly basis.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Skagit County maps and data are created from public records and existing data sources. Records and data have been adjusted to achieve a "best fit" registration to create Skagit County maps. While great care is taken in this process, records and data from different sources rarely agree as to the precise location of geographic features. The relative positioning of map and data features to one another results from combining different sources without ground truthing. Maps and data are approximate and are not designed to be accurate to surveying or engineering standards. Spatial accuracy errors do exist as a result.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Maps and data are for informational purposes only. They do not purport to represent a property boundary survey of any parcels shown and shall not be used for conveyances or the establishment of property.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Maps and data shall be used as a resource only, and any such use of these products with respect to accuracy and precision shall be the sole responsibility of the user.</SPAN></P></DIV></DIV></DIV></DIV>
  Layers/tables: 1; supported query formats: JSON.
- **AssessorDataPoints (FeatureServer)** - https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataPoints/FeatureServer
  Description: <DIV STYLE="text-align:Left;"><DIV><DIV><DIV STYLE="font-size:12pt"><P><SPAN>The Tax Parcel Numbers layer shows the Skagit County parcel identification number as assigned by the Skagit County Assessor. The parcel identification number is a unique identification number that links to additional information in the Assessor database, such as, owner name, property value, and much more. Be aware that, like addresses, these numbers can be deleted so using them in other databases can be risky without implementing a synchronization system.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Skagit County maps and data are created from public records and existing data sources. Records and data have been adjusted to achieve a "best fit" registration to create Skagit County maps. While great care is taken in this process, records and data from different sources rarely agree as to the precise location of geographic features. The relative positioning of map and data features to one another results from combining different sources without ground truthing. Maps and data are approximate and are not designed to be accurate to surveying or engineering standards. Spatial accuracy errors do exist as a result.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Maps and data are for informational purposes only. They do not purport to represent a property boundary survey of any parcels shown and shall not be used for conveyances or the establishment of property.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Maps and data shall be used as a resource only, and any such use of these products with respect to accuracy and precision shall be the sole responsibility of the user.</SPAN></P></DIV></DIV></DIV></DIV>
  Layers/tables: 1; supported query formats: JSON.

## Recommended Custom GPT Instructions

Use these instructions in the Custom GPT builder:

```text
You are an internal Skagit County GIS assistant. Answer user questions by querying Skagit County ArcGIS REST services through the configured action schema. Use the uploaded Skagit ArcGIS technical document as the authoritative layer catalog.

Query rules:
- Always identify the most relevant folder/service/layer before calling queryLayer.
- Use getLayerMetadata when field names, geometry type, or capabilities are uncertain.
- Prefer returnGeometry=false and narrow outFields for normal answers.
- Use resultRecordCount=10-25 for exploratory lookups. Ask a clarifying question if results are ambiguous.
- Use returnCountOnly=true for counts. Use outStatistics only when a layer supports statistics.
- Use outSR=4326 when returning geometry intended for mobile map links.
- Do not invent field names. Use exact field names from this catalog or from getLayerMetadata.
- Explain which layer was queried and report any uncertainty, max-record limits, or ambiguous matches.
- Treat results as operational GIS data, not legal advice. For property, permitting, environmental, or regulatory decisions, tell the user to verify with the responsible department.
```

## Action Schema Design

The schema intentionally avoids one operation per layer. Skagit has more than one thousand layers/tables, and Custom GPT action schemas become harder to use and maintain when every layer is duplicated as a separate endpoint. Instead, the schema exposes the native ArcGIS REST surface:

- `listRoot` and `listFolderServices` for discovery.
- `getServiceMetadata`, `getAllLayersAndTables`, and `getLayerMetadata` for validation.
- `queryLayer` for attribute, spatial, count, pagination, and statistics queries.
- `findInMapService` for loose text search when the target field is not known.

The catalog below is the control layer. It tells the GPT which exact path parameters and fields to use.

## Common Query Patterns

### Attribute lookup

Use `queryLayer` with a precise `where` clause and limited `outFields`. Example pattern: `where=PARCELID = 'P12345'`, `outFields=PARCELID,SITUSADDR,OWNERNAME`, `returnGeometry=false`, `f=json`.

### Count

Use `returnCountOnly=true`, `where=<filter>`, and `f=json`. Do not fetch features just to count them.

### Spatial point-in-polygon

Use `geometry` as an ArcGIS point JSON string, `geometryType=esriGeometryPoint`, `inSR=4326`, `spatialRel=esriSpatialRelIntersects`, `returnGeometry=false`, and only the fields needed for the answer.

### Mobile map output

Use `returnGeometry=true` and `outSR=4326`, then summarize the attributes and provide coordinates or a map link. Keep record counts small.

## Full Layer Catalog

## Folder: Assessor

### Service: ActiveBuildingPermits (MapServer)

- **Service URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/ActiveBuildingPermits/MapServer
- **Layer/table count:** 12

#### Assessor / ActiveBuildingPermits / MapServer / 0 - County Boundary

- **Use when:** County Boundary is a layer in Assessor/ActiveBuildingPermits containing polygon features. Use area as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** area; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/ActiveBuildingPermits/MapServer/0
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/ActiveBuildingPermits/MapServer/0/query


#### Assessor / ActiveBuildingPermits / MapServer / 1 - Townships

- **Use when:** Townships is a layer in Assessor/ActiveBuildingPermits containing polygon features. Use INTTOWNSHIP as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include SHAPE.STArea(), OBJECTID, INTTOWNSHIP, INTRANGE, SHAPE, SHAPE.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** INTTOWNSHIP; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.

#### Assessor / PropertyMap_CU_Inside / MapServer / 7 - Current Use Status

- **Use when:** Current use layer tracks properties that are enrolled in the State Current Use and Designated Forest lands tax deferral program. This program is managed by the Skagit County Assessors office and records the official documents placing the property into the program and the agreement with the landowner to meet the requirements of keeping the property in the designation. In some cases a portion of a property is entered into the agreement and this GIS layer specifies the portions of the property in each type of designation. Current Use Status is a layer in Assessor/PropertyMap_CU_Inside containing polygon features. Use AssessorUse as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include PARCELID, Acres, MapType, Shape.STArea(), Type, created_date, last_edited_date, OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** AssessorUse; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `PARCELID, Acres, MapType, Shape.STArea(), Type, created_date, last_edited_date, OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength(), geolocation, Remap, Notes, created_user, last_edited_user, AuditorFile_Parent, AuditorFile_Last`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/PropertyMap_CU_Inside/MapServer/7
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Assessor/PropertyMap_CU_Inside/MapServer/7/query

FacilitySite_FederalState_Park_1K is a layer in Basemaps/SkagitBasemap containing polygon features. Use NAME as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include DATASOURCENAME, LASTUPDATE, NAME, NAME_LC, NAME_LOCAL, NAME_LOCAL_LC, OWNTYPE, PublishedDate, SHAPE_Area, SUBTYPEFIELD. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** NAME; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `DATASOURCENAME, LASTUPDATE, NAME, NAME_LC, NAME_LOCAL, NAME_LOCAL_LC, OWNTYPE, PublishedDate, SHAPE_Area, SUBTYPEFIELD, OBJECTID, SHAPE, FACILITYID, FCODE, DESCRIPT, LASTEDITOR, SHAPE_Length, ST_PROV`.

#### Districts / LibraryDistrictsWebMap / MapServer / 3 - Library Districts

- **Use when:** Library Districts, also known as 'rural partial-county library districts' are formed during an election by a vote of the people in portions of the unincorporated areas of Skagit County. They are not to be confused with Library Service Areas, which may include a library district in addition to the incorporated area (i.e. city/town) that a library resides in. Library Districts is a layer in Districts/LibraryDistrictsWebMap containing polygon features. Use LIB_DIST_NAME as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include LIB_DIST_NAME, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** LIB_DIST_NAME; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `LIB_DIST_NAME, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Districts/LibraryDistrictsWebMap/MapServer/3
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Districts/LibraryDistrictsWebMap/MapServer/3/query

#### Districts / SkagitCountyDikeDistrictAssessmentAreas / MapServer / 8 - Dike_District_Assessment_Parcels

- **Use when:** This map is created using County data for properties paying into Dike assessments. Use PARCELID as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include PARCELID, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Code_Description, Shape, Shape.STLength(), GlobalID. - **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** PARCELID; **max records:** 2000.

#### Districts / SkagitCountyDrainDistrictAssessmentAreas / MapServer / 7 - Drain_District_Assessment_Parcels

- **Use when:** The intended use of this layer is to give a generalized representation of the vicinity served by these benefit districts. It is important to note that these districts statutorily [according to Title 85 of the revised code of Washington] are defined by the assessment roll adopted by the district commissioners and not necessarily by geographic boundaries. Drain_District_Assessment_Parcels is a layer in Districts/SkagitCountyDrainDistrictAssessmentAreas containing polygon features. Use SitusStName as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, PARCELID, PARCELTYPE, SitusStName, Acres, DistrictTy, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.

#### Geocortex / BaseLayers / MapServer / 23 - Roads (Aerial)

- **Use when:** This layerfile provides a road name labels reference overlay that is particularly useful on top of imagery. The symbology comes from the World Transportation map service by esri. You can add this layerfile on top of any imagery to provide a useful reference overlay that also includes street labels at the largest scales. (At the largest scales, the line symbols representing the streets and roads are automatically hidden and only the labels showing the names of streets and roads are shown). http://www.arcgis.com/home/webmap/viewer.html?webmap=d802f08316e84c6592ef681c50178f17 Roads (Aerial) is a layer in Geocortex/BaseLayers containing records.
- **Geometry:** table/no geometry; **display field:** none captured; **max records:** service default.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **Useful fields:** `No field list captured.`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/BaseLayers/MapServer/23
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/BaseLayers/MapServer/23/query

#### Geocortex / BaseLayers / MapServer / 29 - 144k Road Centerlines

- **Use when:** This layer provides a road name labels reference overlay that is particularly useful on top of imagery. The symbology comes from the World Transportation map service by esri. You can add this layerfile on top of any imagery to provide a useful reference overlay that also includes street labels at the largest scales. (At the largest scales, the line symbols representing the streets and roads are automatically hidden and only the labels showing the names of streets and roads are shown). http://www.arcgis.com/home/webmap/viewer.html?webmap=d802f08316e84c6592ef681c50178f17 144k Road Centerlines is a layer in Geocortex/BaseLayers containing line features. Use FULLNAME as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include ALTROADNAME, ROADNAME, ROADTYPE, AFEDRTETYPE, ASTRTETYPE, DATASOURCENAME, FEDRTETYPE, FULLNAME, FULLNAME_LC, HWY1_TYPE. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolyline; **display field:** FULLNAME; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `ALTROADNAME, ROADNAME, ROADTYPE, AFEDRTETYPE, ASTRTETYPE, DATASOURCENAME, FEDRTETYPE, FULLNAME, FULLNAME_LC, HWY1_TYPE, HWY2_TYPE, HWY3_TYPE, LASTUPDATE, NAME_LOCAL, NAME_LOCAL_LC, PublishedDate, ROADCLASS, ROADLEVEL`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/BaseLayers/MapServer/29
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/BaseLayers/MapServer/29/query

(At the largest scales, the line symbols representing the streets and roads are automatically hidden and only the labels showing the names of streets and roads are shown). http://www.arcgis.com/home/webmap/viewer.html?webmap=d802f08316e84c6592ef681c50178f17 1k Road Centerlines is a layer in Geocortex/BaseLayers containing line features. Use FULLNAME as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include ALTROADNAME, ROADNAME, ROADTYPE, AFEDRTETYPE, ASTRTETYPE, DATASOURCENAME, FEDRTETYPE, FULLNAME, FULLNAME_LC, HWY1_TYPE. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolyline; **display field:** FULLNAME; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `ALTROADNAME, ROADNAME, ROADTYPE, AFEDRTETYPE, ASTRTETYPE, DATASOURCENAME, FEDRTETYPE, FULLNAME, FULLNAME_LC, HWY1_TYPE, HWY2_TYPE, HWY3_TYPE, LASTUPDATE, NAME_LOCAL, NAME_LOCAL_LC, PublishedDate, ROADCLASS, ROADLEVEL`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/BaseLayers/MapServer/50
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/BaseLayers/MapServer/50/query

#### Geocortex / BaseLayers / MapServer / 55 - Waterbody Outlines

- **Use when:** This layer is produced by Skagit County and is designed to show known water features. This may include ponds, lakes, sloughs, channels, bays, rivers, streams, and other areas of water. This information is not comprehensive and is only designed as a general reference. The water bodies may not line up with the aerial photography in many cases. Since this information was designed as a general reference, map accuracy was not a major consideration. There may be discrepancies between the location of the water bodies and the aerial photography. Waterbody Outlines is a layer in Geocortex/BaseLayers containing polygon features. Use WATER as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, WATER, WTR_BDY_TY, SCALE, ANGLE, LABEL, LABELMAP, WTR_BDY_NM_1, GlobalID. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** WATER; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, WATER, WTR_BDY_TY, SCALE, ANGLE, LABEL, LABELMAP, WTR_BDY_NM_1, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/BaseLayers/MapServer/55
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/BaseLayers/MapServer/55/query

#### Geocortex / CriticalAreas / MapServer / 17 - Skagit Watershed Basins

- **Use when:** The Skagit watershed boundaries were created to support the implementation of the Skagit River Basin Instream Resources Protection Program Rule in Skagit County WA. (WAC 173-503) went into effect on April 14, 2001. The rule establishes how Ecology will manage water use in the basin. This includes: Establishing instream flows to protect stream flows in the Skagit and its tributaries for fish and other natural resources. Administering reservations of water for specific future out-of-stream uses. Granting interruptible water rights which cannot be used when flows in certain streams and the river are too low. Evaluating mitigation plans The Skagit rule does not apply to the Samish River Basin. Skagit Watershed Basins is a layer in Geocortex/CriticalAreas containing polygon features. Use SBasin_NM as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, OBJECTID_1, Basin_NM, SBasin_NM, SYMBOL, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** SBasin_NM; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, OBJECTID_1, Basin_NM, SBasin_NM, SYMBOL, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/17
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/17/query

#### Geocortex / CriticalAreas / MapServer / 39 - Closed and Abandoned Landfill Points

- **Use when:** Point locations represent the centroids (centers) of the Closed and Abandoned Landfills polygons. This data is for general reference only and does not represent exact locations . The purpose of this layer is for displaying Landfill locations on smaller scale maps. For more information, contact Skagit County Public Health Department. Closed and Abandoned Landfill Points is a layer in Geocortex/CriticalAreas containing point features. Use Name as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Name, Status, OBJECTID, Landfill_ID, SHAPE. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** Name; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Name, Status, OBJECTID, Landfill_ID, SHAPE`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/39
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/39/query


#### Geocortex / CriticalAreas / MapServer / 40 - Areas of Potential Landfill Influence

- **Use when:** This data is an illustration of the generalized risk area that may be of concern, based on the extent of the "1000' Sphere of Influence - Parcels Intersecting Landfills" polygons. For more information, contact the Skagit County Public Health Department. Areas of Potential Landfill Influence is a layer in Geocortex/CriticalAreas containing polygon features. Use Name as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Name, Shape.STArea(), Status, OBJECTID, Join_Count, TARGET_FID, Landfill_ID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Name; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Name, Shape.STArea(), Status, OBJECTID, Join_Count, TARGET_FID, Landfill_ID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/40
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/40/query


#### Geocortex / CriticalAreas / MapServer / 41 - Closed and Abandoned Landfills

- **Use when:** Landfill boundaries are the approximate extent of the fill material. Landfill boundaries require additional physical site investigation to determine the actual location. All site work within a closed or abandoned landfill must be approved by the Skagit County Public Health Department. For more information, contact Skagit County Public Health Department. Closed and Abandoned Landfills is a layer in Geocortex/CriticalAreas containing polygon features. Use Name as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Name, SHAPE.STArea(), Status, OBJECTID, Landfill_ID, SHAPE, SHAPE.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Name; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Name, SHAPE.STArea(), Status, OBJECTID, Landfill_ID, SHAPE, SHAPE.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/41
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/41/query


#### Geocortex / CriticalAreas / MapServer / 42 - Buffer 1000ft of Landfills

- **Use when:** This data represents a 1000ft buffer applied to Closed and Abandoned Landfills polygons. It is important to note that areas outside this buffer may still be of concern. This data is not available in iMap for public viewing. For more information, contact the Skagit County Public Health Department. Buffer 1000ft of Landfills is a layer in Geocortex/CriticalAreas containing polygon features. Use Shape.STArea() as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Shape.STArea(); **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.

- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/42/query


#### Geocortex / CriticalAreas / MapServer / 43 - Buffer 1000ft of Intersecting Parcels

- **Use when:** This data represents a 1000ft buffer applied to Parcels Intersecting Landfills (raw) layer. It is important to note that areas outside this buffer may still be of concern. This data is not available in iMap for public viewing. For more information, contact the Skagit County Public Health Department. Buffer 1000ft of Intersecting Parcels is a layer in Geocortex/CriticalAreas containing polygon features. Use Shape.STArea() as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Shape.STArea(); **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/43
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/43/query


#### Geocortex / CriticalAreas / MapServer / 44 - Parcels Intersecting Landfills - Modified

- **Use when:** Skagit County Tax Parcels that intersect or are in close proximity to a closed or abandoned landfill as determined by Skagit County Public Health Department. This data is available in iMap for public viewing. Site work in close proximity to a closed or abandoned landfill must be approved by the Skagit County Public Health Department. For more information, contact Skagit County Public Health Department. Parcels Intersecting Landfills - Modified is a layer in Geocortex/CriticalAreas containing polygon features. Use SitusStName as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, PARCELID, PARCELTYPE, SitusStName, Acres, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes, InactiveDate. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** SitusStName; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, PARCELID, PARCELTYPE, SitusStName, Acres, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes, InactiveDate, LivingArea, OwnerAdd1, OwnerAdd2, OwnerAdd3, OwnerState, OwnerZip, PNumber, PropType`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/44
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/44/query

#### Geocortex / CriticalAreas / MapServer / 48 - Group A Public Water System Sources

- **Use when:** The purpose of this spatial dataset is to develop service area boundaries based on tax parcel boundaries for all Group A Public Water Systems in Skagit County. Supplemental Information: 1. In Skagit County, Group A jurisdiction lies with the State Dept. of Health (DOH) and not with Skagit County Health. Contact information for the DOH Regional Engineer for Skagit County is Nancy Feagin. She works out of the Northwest Regional Office in Kent. Her workdays and hours are Monday, Wednesday & Friday 9:30 am to 5 p.m. She can be reached by either calling 253-395-6750 or email at nancy.feagin@doh.wa.gov. The State Dept. of Health fax is 253-395-6760. 2. All of Skagit County is the retail service area for the Public Utility District No. 1 of Skagit County (PUD) per the Skagit County Coordinated Water System Planning process and the PUD’s Municipal Water Law retail service area designation. In addition, for undesignated areas on this map, the PUD is the preferred designated Satellite Management Agency. For more information see Public Utility District No. 1 of Skagit County or the Skagit County Public Health Department. This data represents an increased level of accuracy due to mapping technology. The service area data was provided to the Skagit County Public Health Department in 2010. Water System service areas may be changed by following the Skagit County Coordinated Water System Planning process and the Public Water System Plan review process with both the County and the State Department of Health. 3. Questions can be directed to the Skagit County Health Department (360) 336-9380. 4. This data set does not contain database attributes relating to property ownership. Group A Public Water System Sources is a layer in Geocortex/CriticalAreas containing polygon features. Use Water_System_Name as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Parcel_Based, Shape.STArea(), Water_System_Name, OBJECTID, PWS_ID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Water_System_Name; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Parcel_Based, Shape.STArea(), Water_System_Name, OBJECTID, PWS_ID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/48
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/CriticalAreas/MapServer/48/query

#### Geocortex / Elections / MapServer / 11 - Library Districts

- **Use when:** Library Districts, also known as 'rural partial-county library districts' are formed during an election by a vote of the people in portions of the unincorporated areas of Skagit County. They are not to be confused with Library Service Areas, which may include a library district in addition to the incorporated area (i.e. city/town) that a library resides in. Library Districts is a layer in Geocortex/Elections containing polygon features. Use LIB_DIST_NAME as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include LIB_DIST_NAME, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** LIB_DIST_NAME; **max records:** 3000000.

- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/Elections/MapServer/11/query

### Service: ElectionsVoteWA (MapServer)

- **Service URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer
- **Layer/table count:** 31

#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 1 - Address Layers

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. Address Layers is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing records.
- **Geometry:** table/no geometry; **display field:** none captured; **max records:** service default.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **Useful fields:** `No field list captured.`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/1
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/1/query


#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 2 - Address Points VoteWA (Total Address)

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. This data is a snapshot of addresses from VoteWA. Addresses are coded with the Precinct Split that is currently applied. This layer is intended to be used to verify and compare against Voting Precinct Split boundaries to insure addresses are receiving the proper split. Address Points VoteWA (Total Address) is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing point features. Use AddressNumber as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include AddressNumber, AddressSearch, City, DateLastUpdated, StreetName, StreetType, OBJECTID, StreetPrefix, StreetSuffix, ZipCode. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** AddressNumber; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `AddressNumber, AddressSearch, City, DateLastUpdated, StreetName, StreetType, OBJECTID, StreetPrefix, StreetSuffix, ZipCode, IsMultiUnit, Longitude, Latitude, PrecinctSplit, Shape, GlobalID`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/2
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/2/query


#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 3 - Site Structure Address Points (NG911)

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. A spatial data layer of points representing the location of officially-assigned site/structure addresses by the local addressing authority that contains related attribute information in order to support the needs of public safety applications. Site/structure address points should represent the actual location of a site or structure. Site/structure address points can also represent landmarks. Site/structure address points represent addresses assigned by the local addressing authority, which may not reflect the addresses used in commercial or United States Postal Service (USPS) databases. The Skagit County Address data points were obtained from Skagit County’s NG9-1-1 Project. This project is currently in-progress and incomplete. However, the address data is the most accurate and up to date address information for the County at the time of this distribution. There may be minor changes to the data schema as the project progresses. Horizontal Accuracy of the address data is specified as +/- 13.89 feet per NENA Standard for NG9-1-1 GIS Data Model, NENA-STA-006.1-2018, June 16, 2018 Site Structure Address Points (NG911) is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing point features. Use FullAddress_UnitBldgLbls as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include PARCELTYPE, ParcelID, AddSt_Type, AddressID, AddressNoStreet, AddressNoStreet_UnitBldgLbls, Bldg_Type, Create_Date, FullAddress, FullAddressCSZ. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** FullAddress_UnitBldgLbls; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `PARCELTYPE, ParcelID, AddSt_Type, AddressID, AddressNoStreet, AddressNoStreet_UnitBldgLbls, Bldg_Type, Create_Date, FullAddress, FullAddressCSZ, FullAddressCSZ_EstSt, FullAddressCSZ_UnitBldgLbls, FullAddressUnitBldgLbls_EstSt, FullAddress_EstSt, FullAddress_UnitBldgLbls, GeneralAddress, GeneralAddressCSZ, LandmkName`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/3
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/3/query

Addresses are pulled from the Assessor data and are mapped based on it's associated Tax Parcel Account location. County Plus City Address Labels (Assessor) is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing point features. Use HouseNumber as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include RoadName, ParcelNumber, UnitType, OBJECTID, HouseNumber, UnitNumber, Shape. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** HouseNumber; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `RoadName, ParcelNumber, UnitType, OBJECTID, HouseNumber, UnitNumber, Shape`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/4
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/4/query

#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 6 - Voting Precinct Splits

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. Voting Precinct Splits are intended to show various splits within the Voting Precincts in Skagit County. Voting Precinct Splits are used to code voter address points in the VoteWA system with proper split values. This data originated from the Washington State Office of the Secretary of State and is now being maintained by Skagit County. Changes to this data are submitted to the OSOS and loaded into the VoteWA system. Voting Precinct Splits is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use PPartName as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include CITY, PPartName, STATUS, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, PRECINCT, PREC_NO, GlobalID, SPLIT, CONG. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** PPartName; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `CITY, PPartName, STATUS, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, PRECINCT, PREC_NO, GlobalID, SPLIT, CONG, LEG, CMSN, SCHL, HOSP, PORT, PT_C, PU_C, TRNS`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/6
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/6/query

#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 8 - Voting Precincts

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. The Skagit County Voting Precinct polygon dataset is intended to depict all voting precincts as they are currently described by the Skagit County Auditor's Office. The delineation includes Voting Precincts and Wards. Amendments and revisions are usually made on an annual basis as requested by the Skagit County Auditor's Office. Boundaries are from legal descriptions maintained through the Skagit County Auditors Office. Purpose: The Skagit County Voting Precincts dataset was developed to provide county employees and the public a view of the voting-related boundaries in relation to County geographic features. Voting Precincts is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use PRECINCT as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include STATUS, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, PRECINCT, PREC_NO, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** PRECINCT; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `STATUS, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, PRECINCT, PREC_NO, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/8
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/8/query

#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 11 - Legislative Districts

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. Washington legislative districts are territorial divisions of the state from which a member of the US House of Representatives is elected. The Legislative Districts layer shows all legislative districts covering Skagit County as they were adopted by Washington State Resolution #4409 on February 7, 2012. Where original intent of boundary is clear, data has been modified to fit Skagit County Parcels, Roads, and other data. Legislative Districts is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use SENATOR as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include DISTRICT, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, SENATOR, SEN_WEBSITE, REP1, REP1_WEBSITE, REP2, REP2_WEBSITE. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** SENATOR; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `DISTRICT, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, SENATOR, SEN_WEBSITE, REP1, REP1_WEBSITE, REP2, REP2_WEBSITE, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/11
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/11/query

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. The Skagit County Water Districts dataset consists of digital data describing Water District 1 in Skagit County. Water District 1 boundary is derived by legal descriptions from Skagit County Resolution 11574, and maps provided to Skagit County GIS by Water District 1. - **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. The Fidalgo Park and Recreation District dataset consists of digital data describing the Fidalgo Park and Recreation District. Boundary is derived by legal descriptions from Skagit County Resolution 5748, as provided by Skagit County Auditor’s Office. In some areas, ambiguity in the legal description has been interpreted to represent the intent of the boundary. Data is referenced to the County parcel layer. Fidalgo Park and Recreation District is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use NAME as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include NAME, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, COUNTY, Shape_Leng, Shape.STLength(), GlobalID. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** NAME; **max records:** 3000000.

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. The Public Transportation Benefit Area (PTBA) dataset was provided by Skagit Transit (SKAT) in 2014. Horizontal Accuracy and currentness of this data is unknown. PTBA is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use NAME as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include FULLNAME, NAME, NAMELSAD, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, FID_PTBA20, SUM_Shape_, Shape_Leng, FID_Skagit. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.

#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 17 - Port Commissioner Districts

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. #### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 18 - City Wards

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. The Revised Code of Washington authorizes cities to elect city councilmembers by wards or districts. Wards are used at Skagit County primarily during the election process. Currently, Anacortes, Burlington, Mount Vernon, and Sedro-Woolley have established wards. City Wards is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use WARD as the primary display field when present. Commissioner Districts is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use COMNAME as the primary display field when present. #### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 21 - Library Districts

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. The Skagit County Library Districts dataset consists of digital data describing library districts for all of Skagit County. It is important to note the distinction between a 'Library Service Area' and a 'Library District'. Library districts, also known as 'rural partial-county library districts' are formed during an election by a vote of the people in various unincorporated areas of the county. Often, but not always, a 'library service area' consists of not only the rural partial-county library district, but also the incorporated area in which the library itself is often located. Therefore, a library service area will often consist of both a library district that covers a portion of unincorporated Skagit County in addition to its associated incorporated area (i.e. city/town). Data is referenced to the County parcel layer. Library Districts is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use LIB_DIST_NAME as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include LIB_DIST_NAME, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, GlobalID, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** LIB_DIST_NAME; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `LIB_DIST_NAME, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, GlobalID, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/21
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/21/query

Cemetery Districts is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use District as the primary display field when present. #### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 26 - School Districts

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. The Skagit County School Districts dataset consists of digital data describing school district boundaries In Skagit County. Boundaries are derived by legal description from Skagit County Code Chapter 6.64 and information received from the Office of Superintendent of Public Instruction. As of 2-25-2004, Skagit County Code refers to the Darrington School District as District number 400; however, the OSPI refers to it as District number 330. Since the OSPI is the regulatory agency, we are using District number 330. Data is referenced to the County parcel layer. School Districts is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use NAME as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include NAME, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, DIST_NUM, COUNTY, GlobalID, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** NAME; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `NAME, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, DIST_NUM, COUNTY, GlobalID, Shape.STLength()`.

#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 28 - Roads

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. The Roads layer represents street centerlines for named county, state, private, and incorporated roads within Skagit County. Road centerlines match features in Assessor CAD Maps. Road Names and Type are determined by documents of record and approved/documented information in Mobility. Roads is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing line features. Use ROAD_NO as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include ROAD_DES, ROAD_NM, ROAD_NO, TYPE, OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolyline; **display field:** ROAD_NO; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `ROAD_DES, ROAD_NM, ROAD_NO, TYPE, OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/28
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/28/query


#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 29 - Tax Parcels

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. The Skagit County Tax Parcels are intended to depict Assessor tax accounts created for the County Assessor. This data is intended to represent tax segregations and do not purport to represent "buildable lots". For example, if a parcel is placed in the "open space taxation program", it may be segmented into two pieces. One piece is taxed for "open space" while the other is reserved for "residential" use. This shows up as a parcel with a boundary line separating the different tax designations. Tax Parcels is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use SitusStName as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, PARCELID, PARCELTYPE, SitusStName, Acres, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes, InactiveDate. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** SitusStName; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, PARCELID, PARCELTYPE, SitusStName, Acres, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes, InactiveDate, LivingArea, OwnerAdd1, OwnerAdd2, OwnerAdd3, OwnerState, OwnerZip, PNumber, PropType`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/29
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/29/query


#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 30 - Rural Building Footprints

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. Building footprints created from aerial imagery in 2017 and 2019. Assessment area is most of rural Skagit County. Buildings greater than 150 square feet were identified. Each building has a unique id (SCUID). Status compares the state of the building between 2017 and 2019. Status is planned to be updated every 2 years. Rural Building Footprints is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use Pnumber as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include BldgArea, PNUMBER, Shape.STArea(), Status11_15, Status15_17, Status17_19, Status19_21, prev_area, OBJECTID, pct_change. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Pnumber; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `BldgArea, PNUMBER, Shape.STArea(), Status11_15, Status15_17, Status17_19, Status19_21, prev_area, OBJECTID, pct_change, comment, Shape, Source, x, y, Shape.STLength(), redrawn, SBUID`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/30
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/30/query


#### Geocortex / ElectionsVoteWA / MapServer / 31 - Address Authorities

- **Use when:** This data is intended for Internal Use Only at this time. An address authority polygon depicted in this layer indicates the agency that has ownership of all official address points located within said polygon. The agency is indicated by the value shown in the “Address_Authority” attribute. In other words, the addressing authority is the agency that has full authority to change/add/delete addresses within an address authority polygon at any time. The address authority (polygon) feature class is used to determine which addressing authority has “jurisdiction” or “ownership” of a given address point. This feature class currently covers the full extent of the Skagit 911 Public Safety Answering Point (PSAP) boundary, which currently includes all of Skagit County and a large portion of Whatcom County. It is important to note that any address may have an address authority that is different than it’s addressing System. Address Authorities is a layer in Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA containing polygon features. Use Address_Authority as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Address_Authority, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Address_Authority; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Address_Authority, Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/31
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/ElectionsVoteWA/MapServer/31/query

#### Geocortex / Other / MapServer / 7 - Zip Codes

- **Use when:** The GIS zip code layer consists of polygons that are based on U.S. Postal Service (USPS) zip code boundaries. The GIS zip code layer is for inside County use only because the information is Skagit County’s best guess on zip codes, and may be outdated. The reason it is best-guest is because the USPS currently provides information only by individual addresses, not by zip code region. Therefore, the GIS zip code layer is updated upon discovery of zip code inconsistencies on individual properties. The U.S. Postal Service is the authoritative source for zip codes, and therefore the best way to find out the city and zip is to ask the Post Office, or go to their zip code lookup tool online at usps.com. The USPS does not currently provide a layer or map of zip code boundaries. Zip Codes is a layer in Geocortex/Other containing polygon features. Use ZIPCODE as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, ZIPCODE, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** ZIPCODE; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, ZIPCODE, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/Other/MapServer/7
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/Other/MapServer/7/query

This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.

#### Geocortex / PublicSafety / MapServer / 5 - Incident Data (showing last 60 days)

- **Use when:** Skagit County Incident and Sex Offender Data. Data provided by the following agencies: Anacortes Police Department, Burlington Police Department, Sedro-Woolley Police Department, Skagit County Sheriff's Office. Certain incident types and special case incidents are not shown based on participating agency direction. Limited Data Areas are covered by agencies which have chosen not to participate. However, incidents will be displayed in Limited Data Areas if responded to by any of the participating agencies. Incident Data (showing last 60 days) is a layer in Geocortex/PublicSafety containing point features. Use CaseNumber as the primary display field when present. #### Geocortex / PublicWorks / MapServer / 9 - NPDES Boundary

- **Use when:** Skagit County is the holder of a National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System (NPDES) Phase II permit for the management of municipal surface water runoff and protection of regional water quality. This permit is a requirement under the Federal Clean Water Act that Washington Department of Ecology administers. The NPDES Boundary was provided to Skagit County by the Department of Ecology. The boundary included the incorporated areas. To create the boundary area for rural Skagit County, Skagit County GIS clipped the original boundary to remove the incorporated areas. Anything within the boundary is considered to be in the NPDES Permit area. NPDES Boundary is a layer in Geocortex/PublicWorks containing polygon features. Use Shape.STArea() as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Shape.STArea(); **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/PublicWorks/MapServer/9
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/PublicWorks/MapServer/9/query

#### Geocortex / PublicWorks / MapServer / 24 - Skagit Bay Water Quality Sites

- **Use when:** The Skagit Bay Shellfish Water Quality Sampling Stations are point locations managed by the Department of Ecology. This layer represents a copy of a portion of Ecology’s sites. Therefore this layer should not be considered “authoritative” data by Skagit County. It may be necessary to periodically update this data, in order to incorporate any new changes in the original data source. This can be done as needed, by request from Natural Resources Division – Clean Water. Skagit Bay Water Quality Sites is a layer in Geocortex/PublicWorks containing point features. Use Type_ as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Type_, OBJECTID, Station_ID, Lat, Long_, Shape. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** Type_; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Type_, OBJECTID, Station_ID, Lat, Long_, Shape`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/PublicWorks/MapServer/24
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/PublicWorks/MapServer/24/query


#### Geocortex / PublicWorks / MapServer / 25 - SCMP Ambient Sites Route 1

- **Use when:** Skagit County water quality Monitoring Program (SCMP)'s Ambient Monitoring Sites, Route 1 and 2. These sites are sampled regularly, every two weeks, as part of the Skagit County water quality Monitoring Program. These sites are monitored for water quality, based on dissolved oxygen (DO), temperature, pH, salinity, turbidity, and fecal coliform (FC). It may be necessary to periodically update this data, in order to incorporate any new changes in the original data source. This can be done as needed, by request from Natural Resources Division – Clean Water. SCMP Ambient Sites Route 1 is a layer in Geocortex/PublicWorks containing point features. Use Name as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Name, OBJECTID, Site_ID, Latitude, Longitude, Flows_to, Shape. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** Name; **max records:** 3000000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Name, OBJECTID, Site_ID, Latitude, Longitude, Flows_to, Shape`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/PublicWorks/MapServer/25
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Geocortex/PublicWorks/MapServer/25/query

#### Health / ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap / MapServer / 3 - Closed and Abandoned Landfills

- **Use when:** Point locations representing the centroid of the Closed and Abandoned Landfill polygons. This data is for general reference only and does not represent exact locations. For more information, contact Skagit County Public Health Department. Closed and Abandoned Landfills is a layer in Health/ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap containing point features. Use Name as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Name, Status, OBJECTID, Landfill_ID. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** Name; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.

- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Health/ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap/MapServer/3/query

#### Health / ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap / MapServer / 5 - Areas of Potential Landfill Influence

- **Use when:** This data is an illustration of the generalized risk area that may be of concern, based on the extent of the "1000' Sphere of Influence - Parcels Intersecting Landfills" polygons. For more information, contact the Skagit County Public Health Department. Areas of Potential Landfill Influence is a layer in Health/ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap containing polygon features. Use Name as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Name, Shape.STArea(), Status, OBJECTID, Landfill_ID, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Name; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.

- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Health/ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap/MapServer/5
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Health/ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap/MapServer/5/query

#### Health / ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap / MapServer / 7 - Parcels Intersecting Landfills

- **Use when:** Skagit County Tax Parcels that intersect or are in close proximity to a closed or abandoned landfill as determined by Skagit County Public Health Department. Site work in close proximity to a closed or abandoned landfill must be approved by the Skagit County Public Health Department. For more information, contact Skagit County Public Health Department. Parcels Intersecting Landfills is a layer in Health/ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap containing polygon features. Use SitusStName as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** SitusStName; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Health/ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap/MapServer/7
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Health/ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap/MapServer/7/query


#### Health / ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap / MapServer / 8 - 1000' Sphere of Influence - Parcels Intersecting Landfills

- **Use when:** Skagit County Tax Parcels that are within 1,000 feet of the "Parcels Intersecting Landfills" polygons. In some cases, modifications have been made to indicate a sphere of influence as determined by Skagit County Public Health Department. For more information, contact the Skagit County Public Health Department. 1000' Sphere of Influence - Parcels Intersecting Landfills is a layer in Health/ClosedandAbandonedLandfillsMap containing polygon features. #### Incidents / SkagitCountyEmergencyMap / MapServer / 27 - Roads(Aerial)

- **Use when:** This layerfile provides a road name labels reference overlay that is particularly useful on top of imagery. The symbology comes from the World Transportation map service by esri. You can add this layerfile on top of any imagery to provide a useful reference overlay that also includes street labels at the largest scales. (At the largest scales, the line symbols representing the streets and roads are automatically hidden and only the labels showing the names of streets and roads are shown). http://www.arcgis.com/home/webmap/viewer.html?webmap=d802f08316e84c6592ef681c50178f17 Roads(Aerial) is a layer in Incidents/SkagitCountyEmergencyMap containing records.

- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **Useful fields:** `No field list captured.`.

- **Use when:** This layer provides a road name labels reference overlay that is particularly useful on top of imagery. The symbology comes from the World Transportation map service by esri. You can add this layerfile on top of any imagery to provide a useful reference overlay that also includes street labels at the largest scales. (At the largest scales, the line symbols representing the streets and roads are automatically hidden and only the labels showing the names of streets and roads are shown). http://www.arcgis.com/home/webmap/viewer.html?webmap=d802f08316e84c6592ef681c50178f17 Transportation is a layer in Incidents/SkagitCountyEmergencyMap containing records.
- **Geometry:** table/no geometry; **display field:** none captured; **max records:** service default.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **Useful fields:** `No field list captured.`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Incidents/SkagitCountyEmergencyMap/MapServer/47
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Incidents/SkagitCountyEmergencyMap/MapServer/47/query

## Folder: OpenData

### Service: AssessorDataParcels (FeatureServer)

- **Service URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataParcels/FeatureServer
- **Layer/table count:** 1

#### OpenData / AssessorDataParcels / FeatureServer / 0 - Tax Parcels

- **Use when:** <DIV STYLE="text-align:Left;"><P><SPAN>The Tax Parcels Layer “Property Category” represents Assessor Tax Parcels. They were created for the County Assessor to represent tax segregations. They do not represent "buildable lots". For example, if a parcel is placed in the "open space taxation program", it may be segmented into two pieces. One piece is taxed for "open space" while the other is reserved for "residential" use. This shows up as a parcel with a boundary line separating the different tax designations. This information is updated on a weekly basis.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Skagit County maps and data are created from public records and existing data sources. Records and data have been adjusted to achieve a "best fit" registration to create Skagit County maps. While great care is taken in this process, records and data from different sources rarely agree as to the precise location of geographic features. The relative positioning of map and data features to one another results from combining different sources without ground truthing. Maps and data are approximate and are not designed to be accurate to surveying or engineering standards. Spatial accuracy errors do exist as a result.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Maps and data are for informational purposes only. They do not purport to represent a property boundary survey of any parcels shown and shall not be used for conveyances or the establishment of property.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Maps and data shall be used as a resource only, and any such use of these products with respect to accuracy and precision shall be the sole responsibility of the user.</SPAN></P></DIV> Tax Parcels is a layer in OpenData/AssessorDataParcels containing polygon features. Use PARCELID as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, PARCELID, PARCELTYPE, SitusStName, Acres, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes, InactiveDate. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** PARCELID; **max records:** 2000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, PARCELID, PARCELTYPE, SitusStName, Acres, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes, InactiveDate, LivingArea, OwnerAdd1, OwnerAdd2, OwnerAdd3, OwnerState, OwnerZip, PNumber, PropType`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataParcels/FeatureServer/0
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataParcels/FeatureServer/0/query


### Service: AssessorDataParcels (MapServer)

- **Service URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataParcels/MapServer
- **Layer/table count:** 1

- **Use when:** <DIV STYLE="text-align:Left;"><P><SPAN>The Tax Parcels Layer “Property Category” represents Assessor Tax Parcels. They were created for the County Assessor to represent tax segregations. They do not represent "buildable lots". For example, if a parcel is placed in the "open space taxation program", it may be segmented into two pieces. One piece is taxed for "open space" while the other is reserved for "residential" use. This shows up as a parcel with a boundary line separating the different tax designations. This information is updated on a weekly basis.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Skagit County maps and data are created from public records and existing data sources. Records and data have been adjusted to achieve a "best fit" registration to create Skagit County maps. While great care is taken in this process, records and data from different sources rarely agree as to the precise location of geographic features. The relative positioning of map and data features to one another results from combining different sources without ground truthing. Maps and data are approximate and are not designed to be accurate to surveying or engineering standards. Spatial accuracy errors do exist as a result.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Maps and data are for informational purposes only. They do not purport to represent a property boundary survey of any parcels shown and shall not be used for conveyances or the establishment of property.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Maps and data shall be used as a resource only, and any such use of these products with respect to accuracy and precision shall be the sole responsibility of the user.</SPAN></P></DIV> Tax Parcels is a layer in OpenData/AssessorDataParcels containing polygon features. Use PARCELID as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, PARCELID, PARCELTYPE, SitusStName, Acres, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes, InactiveDate. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** PARCELID; **max records:** 2000.
