- **Useful fields:** `CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, PARCELID, PARCELTYPE, SitusStName, Acres, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes, InactiveDate, LivingArea, OwnerAdd1, OwnerAdd2, OwnerAdd3, OwnerState, OwnerZip, PNumber, PropType`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataParcels/MapServer/0
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataParcels/MapServer/0/query


### Service: AssessorDataPoints (FeatureServer)

- **Service URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataPoints/FeatureServer
- **Layer/table count:** 1

#### OpenData / AssessorDataPoints / FeatureServer / 0 - Tax Parcel Numbers

- **Use when:** <DIV STYLE="text-align:Left;"><DIV><DIV><P><SPAN>The Tax Parcel Numbers layer shows the Skagit County parcel identification number as assigned by the Skagit County Assessor. The parcel identification number is a unique identification number that links to additional information in the Assessor database, such as, owner name, property value, and much more. Be aware that, like addresses, these numbers can be deleted so using them in other databases can be risky without implementing a synchronization system.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Skagit County maps and data are created from public records and existing data sources. Records and data have been adjusted to achieve a "best fit" registration to create Skagit County maps. While great care is taken in this process, records and data from different sources rarely agree as to the precise location of geographic features. The relative positioning of map and data features to one another results from combining different sources without ground truthing. Maps and data are approximate and are not designed to be accurate to surveying or engineering standards. Spatial accuracy errors do exist as a result.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Maps and data are for informational purposes only. They do not purport to represent a property boundary survey of any parcels shown and shall not be used for conveyances or the establishment of property.</SPAN></P><P><SPAN /></P><P><SPAN>Maps and data shall be used as a resource only, and any such use of these products with respect to accuracy and precision shall be the sole responsibility of the user.</SPAN></P></DIV></DIV></DIV> Tax Parcel Numbers is a layer in OpenData/AssessorDataPoints containing point features. Use PNUMBER as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, SitusStName, Acres, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes, InactiveDate, LivingArea, OwnerAdd1. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** PNUMBER; **max records:** 2000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `CityDistrict, OwnerCity, OwnerName, SitusStName, Acres, FireDistrict, GeneralTaxes, InactiveDate, LivingArea, OwnerAdd1, OwnerAdd2, OwnerAdd3, OwnerState, OwnerZip, PNumber, PropType, SaleDate, SaleDeedType`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataPoints/FeatureServer/0
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/AssessorDataPoints/FeatureServer/0/query

#### Planning / ComprehensivePlanWebMap / MapServer / 3 - NPDES Permit Area

- **Use when:** Contains NPDES permit coverage areas for unincorporated Skagit County. Per the NPDES permit, these areas are defined as all urbanized areas and urban growth areas associated with cities under the jurisdictional control of the county in addition to any urban growth area contiguous to urbanized areas under the jurisdictional control of the county.The NPDES_Boundary_poly was created using the Department of Ecology's Phase II Stormwater Permit Coverage map and data for Mount Vernon Urban Area and UGAs.http://www.ecy.wa.gov/programs/wq/stormwater/municipal/maps.htmlIncorporated areas were clipped out of the boundary and other minor modifications were made to address inconsistencies in data sources. NPDES Permit Area is a layer in Planning/ComprehensivePlanWebMap containing polygon features. Use Shape.STArea() as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Shape.STArea(); **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, GlobalID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Planning/ComprehensivePlanWebMap/MapServer/3
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Planning/ComprehensivePlanWebMap/MapServer/3/query

#### Planning / DraftSMP_Service / MapServer / 4 - Draft Shoreline Master Plan

- **Use when:** This dataset represents shoreline environment designations for shoreline jurisdiction surrounding all regulated marine shoreline shoreline, streams/rivers, lakes and open waterbodies in Skagit County, WA. Environment designations were assigned using land use, ownership, functional score, and natural resources, as part of a coordinated and collaborative effort with Skagit County, WA Department of Ecology, and other regulators. Draft Shoreline Master Plan is a layer in Planning/DraftSMP_Service containing polygon features. Use Waterbody as the primary display field when present. #### Planning / NPDESPermitAreaMap / MapServer / 2 - NPDES Permit Area

- **Use when:** Skagit County is the holder of a National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System (NPDES) Phase II Permit for the management of municipal surface water runoff and protection of regional water quality. This permit is a requirement under the Federal Clean Water Act that Washington Department of Ecology administers. The NPDES Permit Boundary represents the area in which the Stormwater Assets are managed under Skagit County's NPDES Phase II Permit. The boundary was created and agreed upon in a joint effort by the Washington State Department of Ecology and Skagit County. In general, the area is reflective of unincorporated Skagit County that has been designated "Urban(ized) Area" per the U.S. Census Bureau and/or Skagit County in the vicinities of Bay View, Mount Vernon, Burlington and Sedro Woolley. NPDES Permit Area is a layer in Planning/NPDESPermitAreaMap containing polygon features. Use Shape.STArea() as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Shape.STArea(); **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Planning/NPDESPermitAreaMap/MapServer/2
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/Planning/NPDESPermitAreaMap/MapServer/2/query

#### PublicWorks / NPDESProMapService / MapServer / 0 - County Boundary

- **Use when:** County Boundary County Boundary is a layer in PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService containing polygon features. Use area as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** area; **max records:** 100000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService/MapServer/0
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService/MapServer/0/query

#### PublicWorks / NPDESProMapService / MapServer / 3 - Stormwater Points

- **Use when:** Stormwater Points is a representation of the current known municipal storm sewer conveyance assets that Skagit County manages and maintains under its NPDES Phase II Permit. Stormwater Points may include catch basins, tide gates, flood gates, grates, pump stations, outfalls, weirs, trash racks, and other connection points. Stormwater Points is a layer in PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService containing point features. Use ASSET_ID as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include TYPE, OBJECTID, ASSET_ID, AGENCY, NPDES_SKAGIT, FUNC, REC_WATER, FLOW_RESTR, OIL_WAT_SEP, RD_SIDE. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** ASSET_ID; **max records:** 100000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `TYPE, OBJECTID, ASSET_ID, AGENCY, NPDES_SKAGIT, FUNC, REC_WATER, FLOW_RESTR, OIL_WAT_SEP, RD_SIDE, RDNO, MP, OFFSET, FISH_PASS, AUTHORIZED, SOURCE, Shape, CEA`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService/MapServer/3
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService/MapServer/3/query


#### PublicWorks / NPDESProMapService / MapServer / 4 - Stormwater Lines

- **Use when:** Stormwater Lines is a representation of the current known municipal storm sewer conveyance assets that Skagit County manages and maintains under its NPDES Phase II Permit. Stormwater Lines may include bridges, ditches, bio swales, curb and gutter, french drains, trenches, culverts, and other linear conveyance features. Stormwater Lines is a layer in PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService containing line features. Use ASSET_ID as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include TYPE_DETAIL, TYPE_GENERAL, OBJECTID, ASSET_ID, AGENCY, NPDES_SKAGIT, MATERIAL_GENERAL, MATERIAL_DETAIL, SIZE_DIA, FUNC. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.

- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.

#### PublicWorks / NPDESProMapService / MapServer / 18 - NPDES Permit Area

- **Use when:** Skagit County is the holder of a National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System (NPDES) Phase II Permit for the management of municipal surface water runoff and protection of regional water quality. This permit is a requirement under the Federal Clean Water Act that Washington Department of Ecology administers. The NPDES Permit Boundary represents the area in which the Stormwater Assets are managed under Skagit County's NPDES Phase II Permit. The boundary was created and agreed upon in a joint effort by the Washington State Department of Ecology and Skagit County. In general, the area is reflective of unincorporated Skagit County that has been designated "Urban(ized) Area" per the U.S. Census Bureau and/or Skagit County in the vicinities of Bay View, Mount Vernon, Burlington and Sedro Woolley. NPDES Permit Area is a layer in PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService containing polygon features. Use Shape.STArea() as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Shape.STArea(); **max records:** 100000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService/MapServer/18
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService/MapServer/18/query

#### PublicWorks / NPDESProMapService / MapServer / 20 - Roads(Aerial)

- **Use when:** This layerfile provides a road name labels reference overlay that is particularly useful on top of imagery. The symbology comes from the World Transportation map service by esri. You can add this layerfile on top of any imagery to provide a useful reference overlay that also includes street labels at the largest scales. (At the largest scales, the line symbols representing the streets and roads are automatically hidden and only the labels showing the names of streets and roads are shown). http://www.arcgis.com/home/webmap/viewer.html?webmap=d802f08316e84c6592ef681c50178f17 Roads(Aerial) is a layer in PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService containing records.
- **Geometry:** table/no geometry; **display field:** none captured; **max records:** service default.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **Useful fields:** `No field list captured.`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService/MapServer/20
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/PublicWorks/NPDESProMapService/MapServer/20/query

Use FULLNAME as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include ALTROADNAME, ROADNAME, ROADTYPE, AFEDRTETYPE, ASTRTETYPE, DATASOURCENAME, FEDRTETYPE, FULLNAME, FULLNAME_LC, HWY1_TYPE. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolyline; **display field:** FULLNAME; **max records:** 100000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.

#### SCData / BuildAMap_Topo / MapServer / 31 - Census Blocks

- **Use when:** This layer shows 2010 census blocks. Census Blocks is a layer in SCData/BuildAMap_Topo containing polygon features. Use Block as the primary display field when present. #### SCData / BuildAMap_Topo / MapServer / 37 - Comprehensive Plan

- **Use when:** The Skagit County Comprehensive Plan Map is a legal document and is considered part and parcel of the Skagit County Comprehensive Plan. The Comprehensive Plan Map is intended to depict Urban Growth Areas, Rural Areas, Natural Resource Lands, and Open Space as described in the Skagit County Comprehensive Plan. Each of these areas may be further divided into land use designations. This data set includes the Skagit County Comprehensive Plan Land Use Map delineation and attributes, adopted by Skagit County Ordinance No. 17938 on July 24, 2000, or as thereafter amended. The data set includes those lands lying generally within Townships 33N through 36N, and Ranges 1E through16E, Willamette Meridian. Amended by Skagit County Ordinance No. 18057 on November 13, 2000. Ordinance No. O20070009 Adopting Skagit County's Seven-Year Update As required By RCW 36.70A.130(4) on October 10, 2007 O20080015 Adopting Certain 2007 Comprehensive Plan Amendment Proposals. Ordinance No. O20080015 Adopting Certain 2007 Comprehensive Plan Amendment Proposals on December 23, 2008 Comprehensive Plan is a layer in SCData/BuildAMap_Topo containing polygon features. Use FEDERAL as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), ZONING_CODE, ZONING_LABEL, OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** FEDERAL; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), ZONING_CODE, ZONING_LABEL, OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/SCData/BuildAMap_Topo/MapServer/37
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/SCData/BuildAMap_Topo/MapServer/37/query

#### TransportationUtilities / StormwaterMap / MapServer / 3 - Stormwater Points

- **Use when:** Stormwater Points is a representation of the current known municipal storm sewer conveyance assets that Skagit County manages and maintains under its NPDES Phase II Permit. Stormwater Points may include catch basins, tide gates, flood gates, grates, pump stations, outfalls, weirs, trash racks, and other connection points. Stormwater Points is a layer in TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap containing point features. Use ASSET_ID as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include TYPE, OBJECTID, ASSET_ID, AGENCY, NPDES_SKAGIT, FUNC, REC_WATER, FLOW_RESTR, OIL_WAT_SEP, RD_SIDE. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** ASSET_ID; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `TYPE, OBJECTID, ASSET_ID, AGENCY, NPDES_SKAGIT, FUNC, REC_WATER, FLOW_RESTR, OIL_WAT_SEP, RD_SIDE, RDNO, MP, OFFSET, FISH_PASS, AUTHORIZED, SOURCE, Shape, CEA`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/3
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/3/query


#### TransportationUtilities / StormwaterMap / MapServer / 4 - Stormwater Lines

- **Use when:** Stormwater Lines is a representation of the current known municipal storm sewer conveyance assets that Skagit County manages and maintains under its NPDES Phase II Permit. Stormwater Lines may include bridges, ditches, bio swales, curb and gutter, french drains, trenches, culverts, and other linear conveyance features. Stormwater Lines is a layer in TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap containing line features. Use ASSET_ID as the primary display field when present. - **Use when:** Stormwater Flow indicates direction of flow where known. Stormwater Flow is a layer in TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap containing line features. Use ASSET_ID as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include OBJECTID, Shape, CEA, HAE, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolyline; **display field:** ASSET_ID; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `OBJECTID, Shape, CEA, HAE, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/5
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/5/query


#### TransportationUtilities / StormwaterMap / MapServer / 6 - Stormwater Assets - Non NPDES

- **Use when:** Stormwater Assets - Non NPDES is a representation of the current known stormwater infrastructure that is not managed or maintained under Skagit County's NPDES Phase II Permit. Stormwater Assets - Non NPDES is a layer in TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap containing records.
- **Geometry:** table/no geometry; **display field:** none captured; **max records:** service default.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **Useful fields:** `No field list captured.`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/6
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/6/query


#### TransportationUtilities / StormwaterMap / MapServer / 7 - Stormwater Points

- **Use when:** Stormwater Points is a representation of the current known municipal storm sewer conveyance assets that are not managed or maintained under Skagit County's NPDES Phase II Permit. Stormwater Points may include catch basins, tide gates, flood gates, grates, pump stations, outfalls, weirs, trash racks, and other connection points. Skagit County is continually adding to this data in an ongoing mapping effort. Stormwater Points is a layer in TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap containing point features. Use ASSET_ID as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include TYPE, OBJECTID, ASSET_ID, AGENCY, NPDES_SKAGIT, FUNC, REC_WATER, FLOW_RESTR, OIL_WAT_SEP, RD_SIDE. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPoint; **display field:** ASSET_ID; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `TYPE, OBJECTID, ASSET_ID, AGENCY, NPDES_SKAGIT, FUNC, REC_WATER, FLOW_RESTR, OIL_WAT_SEP, RD_SIDE, RDNO, MP, OFFSET, FISH_PASS, AUTHORIZED, SOURCE, Shape, CEA`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/7
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/7/query


#### TransportationUtilities / StormwaterMap / MapServer / 8 - Stormwater Lines

- **Use when:** Stormwater Lines is a representation of the current known municipal storm sewer conveyance assets that are not managed or maintained under Skagit County's NPDES Phase II Permit. Stormwater Lines may include bridges, ditches, bio swales, curb and gutter, french drains, trenches, culverts, and other linear conveyance features. Skagit County is continually adding to this data in an ongoing mapping effort. Stormwater Lines is a layer in TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap containing line features. Use ASSET_ID as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include TYPE_DETAIL, TYPE_GENERAL, OBJECTID, ASSET_ID, AGENCY, NPDES_SKAGIT, MATERIAL_GENERAL, MATERIAL_DETAIL, SIZE_DIA, RD_SIDE. This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolyline; **display field:** ASSET_ID; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `TYPE_DETAIL, TYPE_GENERAL, OBJECTID, ASSET_ID, AGENCY, NPDES_SKAGIT, MATERIAL_GENERAL, MATERIAL_DETAIL, SIZE_DIA, RD_SIDE, BEG_RDNO, END_RDNO, BEG_MP, END_MP, BEG_OFFSET, END_OFFSET, FISH_PASS, AUTHORIZED`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/8
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/8/query

#### TransportationUtilities / StormwaterMap / MapServer / 14 - NPDES Permit Area

- **Use when:** Skagit County is the holder of a National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System (NPDES) Phase II Permit for the management of municipal surface water runoff and protection of regional water quality. This permit is a requirement under the Federal Clean Water Act that Washington Department of Ecology administers. The NPDES Permit Boundary represents the area in which the Stormwater Assets are managed under Skagit County's NPDES Phase II Permit. The boundary was created and agreed upon in a joint effort by the Washington State Department of Ecology and Skagit County. In general, the area is reflective of unincorporated Skagit County that has been designated "Urban(ized) Area" per the U.S. Census Bureau and/or Skagit County in the vicinities of Bay View, Mount Vernon, Burlington and Sedro Woolley. NPDES Permit Area is a layer in TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap containing polygon features. Use Shape.STArea() as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** Shape.STArea(); **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/14
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/14/query

Use DIST_NO as the primary display field when present. Useful fields include Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, DIST_NO, Shape.STLength(). This layer supports statistics/aggregation queries. This layer supports advanced where/order/pagination queries.
- **Geometry:** esriGeometryPolygon; **display field:** DIST_NO; **max records:** 1000.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, advanced queries, statistics.
- **Useful fields:** `Shape.STArea(), OBJECTID, Shape, DIST_NO, Shape.STLength()`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/15
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/15/query


#### TransportationUtilities / StormwaterMap / MapServer / 16 - Roads(Aerial)

- **Use when:** This layerfile provides a road name labels reference overlay that is particularly useful on top of imagery. The symbology comes from the World Transportation map service by esri. You can add this layerfile on top of any imagery to provide a useful reference overlay that also includes street labels at the largest scales. (At the largest scales, the line symbols representing the streets and roads are automatically hidden and only the labels showing the names of streets and roads are shown). http://www.arcgis.com/home/webmap/viewer.html?webmap=d802f08316e84c6592ef681c50178f17 Roads(Aerial) is a layer in TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap containing records.
- **Geometry:** table/no geometry; **display field:** none captured; **max records:** service default.
- **Query capabilities:** formats: JSON, geoJSON, PBF.
- **Useful fields:** `No field list captured.`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/16
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/16/query

- **Useful fields:** `ALTROADNAME, ROADNAME, ROADTYPE, AFEDRTETYPE, ASTRTETYPE, DATASOURCENAME, FEDRTETYPE, FULLNAME, FULLNAME_LC, HWY1_TYPE, HWY2_TYPE, HWY3_TYPE, LASTUPDATE, NAME_LOCAL, NAME_LOCAL_LC, PublishedDate, ROADCLASS, ROADLEVEL`.
- **Metadata URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/25
- **Query URL:** https://gis.skagitcountywa.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TransportationUtilities/StormwaterMap/MapServer/25/query
